nasb.text: By the way that he came, by the same he will return, and he will not come to this city,’ declares the Lord.

esv.text: By the way that he came, by the same he shall return, and he shall not come into this city, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: 他從哪條路來，也必從哪條路回去；他必不得進入這城；這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 他必原路返回，不得进入这城。这是耶和华说的。

csbs.text: 他必从原路返回， 也不进入这城。 这是耶和华的宣告。
